title: 10-18-24 Dumbbell workout. Dumbbell Squat Press and others. 9,900 lbs

enrichment.summary: Kyle films himself doing a dumbbell squat-press (thruster) workout at home, cycling through 10, 15, and 25 lb weights for multiple sets while comparing his form and endurance to CrossFit athletes in a video he watches simultaneously. He adjusts his strategy mid-session when he can't handle the 35s, finishes with dumbbell flies and press, and candidly comments on being fat, having weak/tight shoulders, and asthma from smoking weed.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: candidly weak and out of shape compared to trained athletes, but working toward improvement
refuses to ego lift — uses whatever weight he can actually do
prioritizes full range of motion (touching elbows to knees) over lighter range like the athletes he watches
shoulders gas out fast when untrained but believes consistent work will build endurance over time
tight left shoulder is measurably weaker than right — tightness kills strength
